name: fixitnow-backend
description: FixItNow - Home Services Marketplace Backend API

scripts.vercel-build: mkdir -p public && echo 'FixItNow API is running. See /api for endpoints.' > public/index.html && esbuild src/app.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --target=node20 --outfile=api/index.cjs --external:express --external:cors --external:cookie-parser --external:bcryptjs --external:jsonwebtoken --external:pg --external:stripe --external:zod --external:dotenv --external:@prisma/client --external:@prisma/adapter-pg --define:import.meta.url='"file:///var/task/index.cjs"' --footer:js='module.exports = module.exports.default || module.exports;'
